name: Linear Dream
explanation: An LA-synthesis voice in the late-80s digital lineage. Each note layers a short PCM attack transient (selectable: mallet, blown or pluck) over a synthesised sustain body — a sawtooth through a per-voice resonant low-pass with a decaying filter envelope — then through a lush built-in chorus. 8-voice polyphonic. Controls: Attack (transient type), Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount (filter envelope), Chorus and Level. The attack samples are original, self-authored CC0 content synthesised offline (no third-party samples).
